title: The 15 Hermetic Arts

techniques.Creo: I create — make things better/whole; create from nothing; heal (cannot exceed natural perfection).
techniques.Intellego: I perceive — gather true information; not deceived by mundane disguise.
techniques.Muto: I transform — grant properties a thing cannot naturally have; cannot directly injure.
techniques.Perdo: I destroy — make worse or destroy; opposite of Creo.
techniques.Rego: I control — move/shape/command into a state it can naturally have.

forms.Corpus: Human bodies (living, dead, human-seeming magical/faerie bodies).
forms.Herbam: Plants and dead plant matter (wood, linen).
forms.Imaginem: Species/images — sights, sounds, smells (illusion); changes appearance, not substance.
forms.Vim: Raw magical power; affects magical, faerie, divine, and infernal things.

form_bonus: A Form score also gives passive defence = Form/5 (round up) vs related mundane harm; bonuses do not stack.
